description: The On Grip Stay node takes in a global reference of a LocomotionGrip, and fires an event when the grip is happening per frame, as well as information of the locomotion module and the body node that is gripping.

fields.OnEvent: Fires when the grip is being used by the user.
fields.Module: Returns the module that is gripping.
fields.GrippingBodyNode: Returns the body node that is gripping.
